TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Richard_Anderson_(born_in_1926), title = Richard_Anderson_(born_in_1926), year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Richard_Anderson_(born_in_1926)} }

S.FORM: Richard Anderson kawas tay 1926, ryax sa tay 8 nqu tay 8, Richard Anderson, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 2017) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Richard Anderson kawas tay 1926, ryax sa tay 8 nqu tay 8, Richard Anderson, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 2017) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: riʦ~ʨħar* an*ers~ɕon kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, riʦ~ʨħar* an*ers~ɕon, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. (wal mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
